creator: Alex Hughes | Easy Low-Cal Recipes
source_text:
Crispy Honey Buffalo Chicken Loaded Fries

Is there anything better than crispy fried chicken drenched in a sticky sauce? 🤤🫦 

Whenever I start craving a takeaway (ahem the kfc bites 🤣) I just make it at home instead and switch up the sauce depending on what I’m in the mood for. This honey buffalo version might be my favourite yet it’s sweet, spicy, tangy & just ahhhh SO good 

Ingredients (serves 2): 
Fries: 
550g potatoes, cut into fries Oil spray 1 tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp garlic granules Salt Black pepper

Crispy chicken
300g chicken breast, diced 25g cornflour
30g egg white  1 tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp garlic granules Oil spray

Honey buffalo sauce
10g honey 20g buffalo sauce
10g light butter melted 
Ranch
20g ranch dressing 
50g thick greek yoghurt
¼ tsp garlic granules 
Splash of warm water to loosen

To finish
2 tbsp chopped fresh chives or spring onions

💞Optional: For extra crispy fries, soak the potatoes in cold water for 20 minutes, then drain and pat dry thoroughly.

💞Season the fries with the ingredients listed. Air fry at 190°C for 22-25 minutes, shaking halfway through, until golden and crispy.

💞 Add the chicken to a bowl and season with the smoked paprika, garlic granules, salt and black pepper. Pour in the egg white and mix well. 

💞Lift each chicken bite from the egg white mixture, allowing any excess to drip off, then lightly coat in the cornflour.

💞Place into the air fryer basket in a single layer and spray lightly with oil. Air fry at 190°C for 10-12 minutes, shaking halfway through, until golden& crispy. 

💞Mix together the ranch dressing. 

💞Melt the butter in the microwave. 

💞Once the chicken is cooked, add it to the bowl with the butter, honey and buffalo sauce.Toss well until the chicken is evenly coated. 

💞 Serve the fries & top with the honey buffalo chicken.

💞Spoon over the ranch in dollops and finish with the chopped chives or spring onions before serving.

Calories per portion: 551 l Protein: 42.3g l Fat: 11.3g l Carbs: 67.8g 
•
•
_____
